SELECT c1."Id", c1."CreatedAt", c1."IsDeleted", c1."UpdatedAt", c1."UserId", s."Id", s."CartId", s."CreatedAt", s."IsDeleted", s."ProductId", s."Quantity", s."RowVersion", s."UpdatedAt", s."Id0", s."CategoryId", s."CreatedAt0", s."Description", s."ImageUrl", s."IsDeleted0", s."Name", s."Price", s."RowVersion0", s."SearchVector", s."Slug", s."StockQuantity", s."Tags", s."UpdatedAt0"
FROM (
    SELECT c."Id", c."CreatedAt", c."IsDeleted", c."UpdatedAt", c."UserId"
    FROM "Carts" AS c
    WHERE c."UserId" = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS c1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT c0."Id", c0."CartId", c0."CreatedAt", c0."IsDeleted", c0."ProductId", c0."Quantity", c0."RowVersion", c0."UpdatedAt", p0."Id" AS "Id0", p0."CategoryId", p0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p0."Description", p0."ImageUrl", p0."IsDeleted" AS "IsDeleted0", p0."Name", p0."Price", p0."RowVersion" AS "RowVersion0", p0."SearchVector", p0."Slug", p0."StockQuantity", p0."Tags", p0."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0"
    FROM "CartItems" AS c0
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT p."Id", p."CategoryId", p."CreatedAt", p."Description", p."ImageUrl", p."IsDeleted", p."Name", p."Price", p."RowVersion", p."SearchVector", p."Slug", p."StockQuantity", p."Tags", p."UpdatedAt"
        FROM "Products" AS p
        WHERE NOT (p."IsDeleted")
    ) AS p0 ON c0."ProductId" = p0."Id"
) AS s ON c1."Id" = s."CartId"
ORDER BY c1."Id", s."Id"

        SELECT p."Id", p."CategoryId", p."CreatedAt", p."Description", p."ImageUrl", p."IsDeleted", p."Name", p."Price", p."RowVersion", p."SearchVector", p."Slug", p."StockQuantity", p."Tags", p."UpdatedAt"
        FROM "Products" AS p
        WHERE NOT (p."IsDeleted")
    ) AS p0 ON c0."ProductId" = p0."Id"
) AS s ON c1."Id" = s."CartId"
ORDER BY c1."Id", s."Id"

FROM (
    SELECT c."Id", c."CreatedAt", c."IsDeleted", c."UpdatedAt", c."UserId"
    FROM "Carts" AS c
    WHERE c."UserId" = @__userId_0
    LIMIT 1
) AS c1
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT c0."Id", c0."CartId", c0."CreatedAt", c0."IsDeleted", c0."ProductId", c0."Quantity", c0."UpdatedAt", p0."Id" AS "Id0", p0."CategoryId", p0."CreatedAt" AS "CreatedAt0", p0."Description", p0."ImageUrl", p0."IsDeleted" AS "IsDeleted0", p0."Name", p0."Price", p0."RowVersion", p0."SearchVector", p0."Slug", p0."StockQuantity", p0."Tags", p0."UpdatedAt" AS "UpdatedAt0"
    FROM "CartItems" AS c0
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT p."Id", p."CategoryId", p."CreatedAt", p."Description", p."ImageUrl", p."IsDeleted", p."Name", p."Price", p."RowVersion", p."SearchVector", p."Slug", p."StockQuantity", p."Tags", p."UpdatedAt"
        FROM "Products" AS p
        WHERE NOT (p."IsDeleted")
    ) AS p0 ON c0."ProductId" = p0."Id"
) AS s ON c1."Id" = s."CartId"
ORDER BY c1."Id", s."Id"
